scRNA-seq

Speaker notes:
dunn_res <- summary_df_TNBC %>%
 dunn_test(mean_oxstress_patient_celltype ~ celltype_major, p.adjust.method = "BH")
dunn_sig <- dunn_res %>% 
 filter(p.adj <= 0.05) %>%
 mutate(y.position = seq(0.22, 0.3, length.out = n()))

t-CyCIF

pScore per core

Speaker notes:
Perform and annotate statistical tests (Mann-Whitney U test)
for i, (g1, g2) in enumerate(comparisons):
 v1 = df_melt[df_melt["Cell_Type"] == g1]["Density"]
 v2 = df_melt[df_melt["Cell_Type"] == g2]["Density"]
 stat, p = mannwhitneyu(v1, v2, alternative='two-sided')

t-CyCIF

Scimap proximity score

Define the proximity between specified cell types within spatial data. It calculates two distinct scores:
Proximity Density: Total number of interactions identified divided by the total number of cells of the cell-types that were used for interaction analysis.
Proximity Volume: Total number of interactions identified divided by the total number of all cells in the data.
